# delegate()

**Instance Method**

Returns the composition parameter view delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
func delegate() -> Any!
```

## Return Value

The composition parameter view delegate.

## Setting and Retrieving the Delegate

- **setDelegate(_:)**: Sets the composition parameter view delegate.
